description: A customer's property taxes have increased, and they want to understand how this will affect their monthly mortgage payment.

nodes.task_description: Identify the customer and their mortgage account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the customer's mortgage loan.

nodes.task_description: Run an escrow analysis with the new, higher property tax amount.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs the analysis, which shows a shortage in the escrow account.

nodes.task_description: Explain the escrow shortage and the resulting increase in the customer's monthly payment.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains why the payment is increasing and what the new payment amount will be.
